name: @generata/standup
description: Daily standup generator: reads git activity, drafts a 3-bullet update (yesterday / today / blockers).
postInstall:
1. cd into a git repo (or set --repo <path> on the workflow)
  2. pnpm generata standup

The workflow reads yesterday's commits and prints a draft standup. Edit agents/standup-writer.ts to adjust tone or format.
